title: senecio kermadecensis
intro: Senecio kermadecensis, also known as Kermadec ragwort, is a flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Senecio kermadecensis are said to include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing pain and inflammation. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
